goal: Add a renderer-neutral viewport gesture policy module, prove XyFlow-aligned pan/zoom gate behavior, expose it to conformance scenarios, then close the lane with fresh evidence.
checkpoints: after JVGP-020 pure viewport policy tests pass
after JVGP-040 public surface and closeout gates pass
side_effect_policy: User authorized autonomous commits for this long-running goal; commit only verified bounded work, do not push, and do not revert unrelated user changes.
stop_conditions: renderer or platform dependency required inside jellyflow-core or jellyflow-runtime
existing viewport math behavior changes without an intentional test update
fixture schema changes beyond viewport gesture policy
scope expands into pan inertia scheduling, double-click animation, or adapter renderer smoke tests
result: Viewport gesture policy lane closed with pure runtime policy, conformance fixture actions, public surface coverage, package tests, clippy, JSON, and diff evidence.
